mapper.select: SELECT o.id, o.order_code, o.buyer_id, o.seller_id, o.work_id, o.auction_id, o.order_type, o.license_type, o.original_price, o.discount_amount, o.fee_amount, o.total_price, o.deposit_amount, o.deposit_status, o.status, o.ordered_at, o.paid_at, o.completed_at, b.nickname AS buyer_nickname, s.nickname AS seller_nickname, w.title AS work_title FROM tbl_order o JOIN tbl_member b ON o.buyer_id = b.id JOIN tbl_member s ON o.seller_id = s.id LEFT JOIN tbl_work w ON o.work_id = w.id WHERE o.id = #{orderId}

SELECT o.id, o.order_code, o.total_price, o.order_type, o.status, o.ordered_at, w.title AS work_title, w.thumbnail AS work_thumbnail FROM tbl_order o LEFT JOIN tbl_work w ON o.work_id = w.id WHERE o.buyer_id = #{buyerId} ORDER BY o.ordered_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT o.id, o.order_code, o.total_price, o.order_type, o.status, o.ordered_at, w.title AS work_title, w.thumbnail AS work_thumbnail FROM tbl_order o LEFT JOIN tbl_work w ON o.work_id = w.id WHERE o.seller_id = #{sellerId} ORDER BY o.ordered_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_order WHERE buyer_id = #{buyerId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_order WHERE seller_id = #{sellerId}
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_order SET status = #{status}, completed_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'COMPLETED' THEN NOW() ELSE completed_at END, refunded_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'REFUNDED' THEN NOW() ELSE refunded_at END WHERE id = #{orderId}
